expectedTools.name: qa.recommend_profile
expectedTools.description: Choose the QA profile for a project template, risk profile, and stack.

output.profile: profile id with required runners and hard blockers

expectedTools.name: qa.plan_run
expectedTools.description: Preview the QA DAG without executing it.

output.plan: runner DAG, estimated time, missing tools, and risks

expectedTools.name: qa.run
expectedTools.description: Run QA gates against a project and return a normalized report.

expectedTools.name: qa.explain_score
expectedTools.description: Explain why a project received its readiness score.

expectedTools.name: qa.evidence
expectedTools.description: Return or package evidence for a completed run.

kernelUsage: every generated template must map to a QA profile
deploy.prepare must fail if required QA blockers remain
case studies should include QA evidence when available
deep QA modes should require explicit user intent for costly external actions
